nasb.text: When Balaam saw that it pleased the Lord to bless Israel, he did not go as at other times to seek omens but he set his face toward the wilderness.

esv.text: When Balaam saw that it pleased the Lord to bless Israel, he did not go, as at other times, to look for omens, but set his face toward the wilderness.

cnv.text: 巴蘭見耶和華喜歡賜福以色列，就不再像前兩次一樣去求觀兆的方法，卻面向曠野。

ccb.text: 巴兰见耶和华乐意赐福给以色列人，就不再像先前两次那样去求兆头，而是面向旷野，
